scripts.destroy:api: ((../scripts/deploy/destroy-stack.sh frontend || true) & (../scripts/deploy/destroy-stack.sh alarm || true) & wait); ../scripts/deploy/destroy-stack.sh api
scripts.get:dev:url: node -e "const o=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('outputs.json', 'utf8')); const api=o['Awdah-api-stack-dev']; const fe=o['Awdah-frontend-stack-dev']; console.log(fe?.CloudFrontUrl || fe?.S3Url || api?.ApiUrl || 'No URL found')"
scripts.get:prod:url: node -e "const o=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('outputs.json', 'utf8')); const api=o['Awdah-api-stack-prod']; const fe=o['Awdah-frontend-stack-prod']; console.log(fe?.CloudFrontUrl || fe?.S3Url || api?.ApiUrl || 'No URL found')"
